]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to extract structured representations and automatically generate deployable artifacts. Transitions between lifecycle stages are managed via automated MDE processes with minimal manual intervention, supported by role-based governance structures."
]

]

    base:desc "Model-driven deployment with automated processes minimizes manual intervention, leveraging modular architecture and standardized extension points for scalable deployment. ]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
